title: Launch timeline slip
description: Multiple blockers (auth bugs, SSL, load testing) risk pushing the launch date. 3 critical actions are blocked or not started.
mitigationPlan: Daily standups to track blockers. Identify items that can be deferred to v1.1.

title: API performance under load
description: API endpoints have not been load tested. Database queries may be slow under production traffic volumes, especially with concurrent users.
mitigationPlan: Conduct load testing before launch. Optimize database queries. Implement caching layer.

title: Third-party auth provider reliability
description: The OAuth provider had 2 outages in March and returns non-standard error formats for edge cases, affecting our integration reliability.
mitigationPlan: Implement fallback authentication method. Monitor provider status page. Set up alerting.

title: Scope creep from beta feedback
description: Beta testers requested features (keyboard shortcuts, advanced reporting) that could expand scope beyond v1 boundaries if not managed.
mitigationPlan: Established strict v1 feature boundary. Beta feedback categorized into v1 must-have vs v1.1 nice-to-have.

title: Single point of failure on DevOps knowledge
description: Tom is the only team member who understands the full infrastructure setup. If he's unavailable, deployments and infrastructure changes are blocked.
mitigationPlan: Tom to document all infrastructure procedures. Cross-train Maria on deployment process.
